# Welcome to Folio

A beautiful markdown reader for developers.

## Features

- **Beautiful typography** with Literata serif font
- Light and dark themes
- Syntax highlighting for 190+ languages
- Live file watching

## Code Example

```javascript
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}
```

## Table

| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Tabs | Done |
| Search | Done |
| PDF Export | Done |

> **Note**: This is a test document for Folio's screenshot tests.
